text: Apple's competitive positioning shows mixed signals as of mid-2025. While the stock has more than doubled over the past five years and remains a reliable long-term investment that has regularly outperformed the S&P 500, recent performance indicates challenges []. The stock is down 15% for the year as of July 2025, with shares remaining relatively flat while the broader market rallied from April and May lows []. Concerns have emerged regarding Apple's artificial intelligence strategy, with commentary suggesting the company has fallen behind in the AI arms race compared to peers []. Jim Cramer noted Apple appears to have no visible AI strategy while continuing aggressive stock buybacks, suggesting potential acquisition targets like Perplexity could help change course []. In streaming, Apple TV+ competes against well-heeled rivals including Disney, Amazon, and Netflix [].
